WriterProxy.name: TemporalTransformsWriter

Documentation.long_help: Write time-indexed transforms to CSV. Columns: Time(s),Rx(Roll)(d),Ry(Pitch)(d),Rz(Yaw)(d),X(m),Y(m),Z(m). If arrays named Longitude, Latitude (and optionally Altitude) exist on the input, they are appended as extra columns.

WriterProxy.Documentation: Write in a CSV the list of time indexed transforms. Usually these transforms represent the pose trajectory of a solid over time. The CSV has the following columns: Time(s),Rx(Roll)(d),Ry(Pitch)(d),Rz(Yaw)(d),X(m),Y(m),Z(m). If arrays named Longitude, Latitude (and optionally Altitude) exist on the input, they are appended as extra columns.

StringVectorProperty.name: FileName
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: The path to the CSV formated file to write.

IntVectorProperty.name: WriteInDegrees
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If true write orientation angles in degrees instead of radians.
